requiredDocuments.name: Original passport
requiredDocuments.notes: valid for full duration of stay + 1 blank page

requiredDocuments.name: Bank statement (last 6 months)
requiredDocuments.notes: stamped, showing sufficient funds — rule of thumb ~£100/day of planned stay

requiredDocuments.name: Salary slips (last 6 months)
requiredDocuments.notes: or business income proof if self-employed

requiredDocuments.name: Leave approval letter / No Objection Certificate
requiredDocuments.notes: from employer, company letterhead, mentioning travel dates

requiredDocuments.name: Tentative flight itinerary
requiredDocuments.notes: do NOT buy tickets until visa approved — UK does not require confirmed tickets at application time

requiredDocuments.name: Accommodation proof
requiredDocuments.notes: hotel bookings (refundable accepted) or sponsor's address if staying with family/friends

requiredDocuments.name: Travel insurance
requiredDocuments.notes: recommended but not mandatory for visit visa

requiredDocuments.name: Cover letter
requiredDocuments.notes: purpose of visit, day-by-day plan, return intent, ties to India

commonRejectionReasons: Insufficient evidence of intent to return to India
Inadequate financial proof for the proposed trip
Weak ties to home country (no stable job, no family, no property)
disclaimer: Acid-test placeholder data — verify against official UKVI / VFS before relying on for an actual application.
